message: Hello! I'm your BPMN Modeling Agent. I'll analyze the task now and start planning the diagram.
I've analyzed the task and defined 8 goals for the model.

Iteration 1 — setting up the participant structure (pools/lanes) first: Insurance Company as the main expanded pool with roles split into lanes; Customer and External Assessor as collapsed external participants for message-only interactions.

I will now model the complete claim-handling process inside the existing pools/lanes, including coverage/amount decisions, assessor commissioning with 10-business-day timeout, and customer notifications via message end events.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 12 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 9 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 1/3…
Adding the missing cross-pool message flows for Customer and External Assessor interactions (start trigger, assessor commissioning/report, and all customer notifications).
Fixing Goal 8: move the final rejection notification to the Claims Handler lane and ensure it is sent to the Customer via a message end event.
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
⚠️ 1 critical issue(s) detected. Automatically starting correction pass 2/3…

I will remove the incorrect duplicate final rejection end event in the Insurance System lane so there is only one final rejection notification to the Customer (the existing Claims Handler end event with message flow).
I've reviewed the completed model. Found 4 issue(s) — details below.
